messages.content:
translate this email to english version: Cher All,

J’espère que vous vous portez bien. Je suis Adel ZOMMIT, le CAMO de TUNISAIR Express. J’ai essayé de vous contacter par téléphone, mais sans succès. 
Je vous prie de bien vouloir nous soutenir dans la réalisation de la tâche MPD : 313000-FUT-10000-2 ( voir fichier ci-joint) sur le SSFDR model FA2100 P/N  …….nos avions ATR72-600, MSN :1582 & 1625 ASAP.
Dans cette optique, l’un de vos membres d’équipe pourrait se rendre à Tunis pour effectuer l’opération de test fonctionnel (pompage de tous les paramètres, suivi de leur lecture et analyse, accompagnés d’un rapport final qui sera communiqué le plus tôt possible). Nous sommes dans l’urgence, donc votre réponse rapide serait grandement appréciée.

Je reste à votre disposition pour toute information complémentaire.

Cordialement,

Dear All,

I hope you are doing well. I am <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, the CAMO of TUNISAIR Express. I have tried to contact you by phone, but without success.
I kindly request your support in carrying out the MPD task: 313000-FUT-10000-2 (see attached file) on the SSFDR model FA2100 P/N....... for our ATR72-600 aircraft, MSN: 1582 & 1625, ASAP.
In this regard, one of your team members could come to Tunis to perform the functional test operation (pumping of all parameters, followed by their reading and analysis, accompanied by a final report which will be communicated as soon as possible). We are in a hurry, so your prompt response would be greatly appreciated.

I remain at your disposal for any further information.

Best regards,

answeer to this email:  Dear Mr. Zommit, 

I am very pleased receiving your message.
This is the base maintenance request received from Tunis after a very long time.
Our last customer from your region was Syphax…..

Start of the MSN 1625 maintenance period falls in to our peak season. 
All our maintenance bays are completely full till May 2024.

Due to this fact CSAT will not take part in your tender.

Thanks for your understanding.
Best regards,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Dear Mr. Pikl,

Thank you for your response. We appreciate your prompt attention to our request.

We understand that your maintenance facilities are currently fully booked until May 2024 and that CSAT will not be able to take part in our tender for the MPD task on our ATR72-600 aircraft.

We will explore alternative options and find a solution to the urgent need for this task.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

correct this email:      Dear FREDERIC,
Hope you are doing well,
As you may know, we have one aircraft MSN:1582 is currently under a heavy visit check at Tunisair Technics and its sister MSN:1625  is undergoing to compensate all commercial programs. This last talk aircraft has a temporary repair  on the MLG R/H Pannel and we programmed its final repair on DEC 5th /2023; following the lake of ingredients and parts( see below emails) to make this final repair at either ATR or Boeing  we until now couldn’t find elsewhere; on what, and knowing that we daily make the inspection according to your geeven instruction on the temporary repair and there’s no propagation of the damage;  we do appreciate if you be so kind and grant us a posteponing of this repair to the heavy visit check on FEB 4th /2024.
My warmest regards 
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Dear Frederic,

I hope this email finds you well. 

As you may be aware, our aircraft with MSN: 1582 is currently undergoing a heavy visit check at Tunisair Technics, while its sister aircraft with MSN: 1625 is being used to compensate for all commercial programs. However, the latter aircraft has a temporary repair on the MLG R/H Panel, and we have scheduled its final repair for December 5th, 2023. Unfortunately, we have been facing difficulties in sourcing the necessary ingredients and parts for this final repair, as detailed in the previous emails. Despite our efforts, we have been unable to find these items either at ATR or Boeing, or anywhere else. 

Moreover, I would like to emphasize that we conduct daily inspections in accordance with your given instructions for the temporary repair, and there has been no propagation of damage.

In light of these circumstances, we would greatly appreciate it if you could kindly grant us a postponement of this repair to coincide with the heavy visit check scheduled for February 4th, 2024.

Thank you very much for your understanding.

Warmest regards,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

corrigez cet email:  Bonjour a tous,
Comme a été convenu par téléphone avec si Mounir, et faisons référence au mail ici-bas du notre conventiennel MRO Standard AERO France, qui demande le report de la date limite le 11/12/2023 et je vous propose comme nouvelle date : le 27/12/2023. Par la meme occasion nous vous informons que je vais demander un avenant de trois mois apartir du 1er Janvier 2024.
Bien à vous

Bonjour à tous,

Comme convenu lors de notre conversation téléphonique avec M. Mounir, nous faisons référence à notre correspondance précédente concernant notre convention MRO avec Standard AERO France. Nous souhaitons demander le report de la date limite au 11 décembre 2023, et nous vous proposons comme nouvelle date : le 27 décembre 2023. Dans le même temps, nous tenons à vous informer que nous envisageons de demander un avenant de trois mois à partir du 1er janvier 2024.

Bien à vous,

ansewer positively  to this email:    Hello Adel,
 
Thank you for your time and dedication throughout the application process for the Propulsion Engineer position. Regrettably, we must inform you that your candidacy has not been retained at this time.
 
We encourage you to continue discovering your potential for future career opportunities at Air Canada. If you haven’t already done so, we encourage you to sign up for Job Alerts which will send you email notifications whenever new opportunities are posted.
 
To set up job alerts on the See All Jobs page, search by keyword or filter by location and the “Create Job Alert” option will become available on the page.
 
Thank you for your interest in this career opportunity with Air Canada. We wish you every success in the pursuit of your career goals.
 
Sincerely,
 
Air Canada Talent Acquisition

Hello Air Canada Talent Acquisition,

Thank you for getting back to me and for considering my application for the Propulsion Engineer position. While I am disappointed to learn that my candidacy has not been retained at this time, I appreciate your time and dedication throughout the application process.

I will definitely take your advice and continue exploring potential career opportunities at Air Canada. I will sign up for Job Alerts to stay updated on any new positions that align with my skills and interests.

Thank you again for considering me for this opportunity. I will continue to pursue my career goals with enthusiasm and determination.

Warm regards,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

correct this email:    Hello Air Canada Talent Acquisition,

Thank you for getting back to me and for considering my application for the Propulsion Engineer position. While I am disappointed to learn that my candidacy has not been retained at this time, I appreciate your time and dedication throughout the application process.

I will definitely take your advice and continue exploring potential career opportunities at Air Canada. I will sign up for Job Alerts to stay updated on any new positions that align with my skills and interests.
Nevertheless, and with a view to my development in my career and to improve my weak points; could you inform me what are my weakness points for this role.


Thank you again for considering me for this opportunity. I will continue to pursue my career goals with enthusiasm and determination.

Warm regards,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Hello Air Canada Talent Acquisition,

Thank you for getting back to me and for considering my application for the Propulsion Engineer position. While I am disappointed to learn that my candidacy has not been retained at this time, I appreciate your time and dedication throughout the application process.

I will definitely take your advice and continue exploring potential career opportunities at Air Canada. I will sign up for Job Alerts to stay updated on any new positions that align with my skills and interests. However, in order to further develop my career and improve my weaknesses, I kindly request if you could provide me with feedback on what areas I need to work on for this role.

Thank you again for considering me for this opportunity. I will continue to pursue my career goals with enthusiasm and determination.

Warm regards,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

correct this email:    Dear ASYA,
We do thank you for getting back to us and for considering our tender;however, we regrettably must  inform you that the visit calander check cannot postponed further than FEB 04th /2024. On what we will do thank you again for your participation and since your contacts are currently in our data base, we will revert back to you for another work.
All the best

Dear Asya,

Thank you for your response and for considering our tender. However, we regret to inform you that the visit calendar check cannot be postponed beyond February 4th, 2024. We appreciate your participation and since we have your contacts in our database, we will reach out to you for future opportunities.

All the best,

[Your Name]

corrigez cette lettre de motivation:      A Monsieur Le Président Directeur Général

Objet : Demande de Candidature.

              J’ai l’honneur de venir par la présente, solliciter votre haute bienveillance, une demande de Candidature au sein de votre compagnie TRANSAVIA pour exercer les fonctions de Directeur Engineering.
              Sachant que je suis de formation de base Math technique et titulaire  d’un diplôme d’Officier Ingénieur en Mécanique Avion  (Bac+6ans) de l’Ecole de l’Aviation de Bordj El Amri  .Ayant effectuer plusieurs stages de formations   dont la durée varie entre une semaine et une année, dans l’armée de l’air tunisienne et à l’étranger, y compris le pilotage.
            Et vue ma formation polyvalente entre scientifique et militaire (Leadership, sensation sécuritaire, l’organisation et la discipline) j’ai fais un parcours professionnel Honorable dans différents type et échelon de responsabilités dans le domaine de la maintenance aéronautique, en effet les  deux félicitations  que j’ai reçu de la part du ministère de la défense font un bon exemple.
           Avec La compagnie TUNISAIR EXPRESS ex SEVENAIR, et en Mars 2009 j’étais Responsable dans la direction engineering moteur où j’ai suit tous les formations nécessaires (IFR, Hélice, PW100, ECTM, Réacteur CF34, APU, DMC, PART M, Qualification de Type, CDCCL, EWIS, Facteur Humain, etc.….)aussi bien que j’ai pu réduire le coût de réparation de 23% du cout totale , 
Depuis 09/2012 à ce jours, j’assure    la fonction du Directeur de tous l’engineering et en même temps l’engineering  moteurs avec l’assistance technique au niveau MRO. Il est à noter nos KPI est de l’ordre 96% à 99% et nos réalisations qui est tributaires essentiellement du budget alloué a pu atteindre 87% des objectifs.
           Finalement, d’un caractère ouvert et entreprenant, mes aptitudes au travail et mon goût  pour la technique m’amène  à penser que j’ai de bons atouts pour faire participer à l’évolution et à la progression de votre honorable compagnie. 

Restant à votre disposition, je vous pris de croire, Monsieur, en l’expression de mes sincères salutations

A Monsieur Le Président Directeur Général,

Objet: Demande de Candidature

J'ai l'honneur de solliciter votre bienveillance pour une demande de candidature au sein de votre compagnie TRANSAVIA afin d'occuper le poste de Directeur Engineering.

Je suis titulaire d'un diplôme d'Officier Ingénieur en Mécanique Avion de l'École de l'Aviation de Bordj El Amri, avec une formation de base en mathématiques techniques. J'ai également effectué plusieurs stages de formation, d'une durée variant entre une semaine et un an, dans l'armée de l'air tunisienne et à l'étranger, y compris dans le domaine du pilotage.

Grâce à ma formation polyvalente entre les aspects scientifiques et militaires (leadership, sécurité, organisation et discipline), j'ai acquis une expérience professionnelle honorable, occupant différents types et niveaux de responsabilités dans le domaine de la maintenance aéronautique. Les deux félicitations que j'ai reçues du ministère de la Défense témoignent de mes compétences.

Depuis mars 2009, j'ai occupé le poste de Responsable dans la direction engineering moteur au sein de la compagnie TUNISAIR EXPRESS, anciennement SEVENAIR. J'ai suivi toutes les formations nécessaires dans ce domaine et j'ai réussi à réduire les coûts de réparation de 23% du coût total.

Depuis septembre 2012 jusqu'à ce jour, j'occupe le poste de Directeur de l'engineering, ainsi que celui de l'engineering moteurs avec une assistance technique au niveau MRO. Nous avons atteint un taux de KPI compris entre 96% et 99%, et nos réalisations, fortement tributaires du budget alloué, représentent 87% des objectifs fixés.

En conclusion, de par ma personnalité ouverte et entreprenante, mes compétences professionnelles et ma passion pour la technique aéronautique, je pense posséder les atouts nécessaires pour contribuer à l'évolution et à la réussite de votre prestigieuse compagnie.

Je reste à votre disposition et vous prie de croire, Monsieur, en l'expression de mes salutations sincères.
what are the maintenance philosophy and strategy?

Maintenance philosophy and strategy refer to the approach and plan that organizations follow to ensure the optimal functioning, reliability, and safety of their assets. Here are the main components of maintenance philosophy and strategy:

1. Preventive Maintenance: This approach involves conducting regular inspections, servicing, and replacing components to prevent failures and extend the lifespan of assets. It aims to address issues before they become critical.

2. Corrective Maintenance: This strategy involves repairing or replacing assets after they have failed. It focuses on restoring functionality as quickly as possible to minimize downtime. Corrective maintenance is often combined with preventive maintenance for a comprehensive approach.

3. Predictive Maintenance: This strategy utilizes condition monitoring techniques, such as vibration analysis, thermography, or oil analysis, to predict when maintenance should be performed. It aims to identify early signs of potential failures and schedule maintenance accordingly to avoid unexpected downtime.

4. Reliability-centered Maintenance (RCM): RCM is a systematic approach that determines the most effective maintenance tasks based on the criticality and reliability requirements of assets. It prioritizes maintenance actions that can prevent or mitigate failures with the highest impact on operations or safety.

5. Total Productive Maintenance (TPM): TPM focuses on involving all stakeholders, including operators, maintenance teams, and management, to improve equipment effectiveness continuously. It includes autonomous maintenance by operators, planned maintenance, and focused improvement initiatives.

6. Risk-based Maintenance (RBM): RBM prioritizes maintenance tasks based on the risks associated with failures. It considers the consequences of potential failures and the probability of occurrence to allocate resources effectively.

7. Outsourcing and Vendor Support: Organizations may adopt strategies to outsource certain maintenance tasks or seek support from vendors or specialized service providers. This approach can help leverage external expertise and resources while focusing on core competencies.

The specific maintenance philosophy and strategy adopted by an organization depend on various factors like the industry, asset types, criticality, budget constraints, and regulatory requirements. It is essential for organizations to develop a tailored approach to maintenance that aligns with their operational goals and objectives.

correct this email:     Dear Szymon,
Thank you for getting back to us, and lets  us draw to your attention that according to your geeven  SRAS the repair life limit is next A check or 750FH  whichever accurs first; the aircraft will be stopped on DEC 5th /2023 for it’s A10 check ( the remaining time to A10 check is 40FH); 
Additionnaly, please be advised that :
-	The current aircraft TSN:7143.27:
-	The current CSN:7380 
My warmest regards.
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Dear Szymon,

Thank you for your response. We would like to bring to your attention that, based on the given SRAS, the repair life limit for the aircraft is the next A check or 750FH, whichever occurs first. Accordingly, the aircraft will undergo its A10 check on December 5th, 2023, with 40FH remaining until the A10 check is due.

Additionally, please be advised of the following information:

- The current aircraft TSN: 7143.27
- The current CSN: 7380

Thank you once again.

Warmest regards,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

corrigez cet email:      Bonjour si Walid,

Afin de ne pas pénaliser la sortie du grand  chantier encours de l’avion TS-LBF ; nous vous prions de considérer les commandes objet de l’Email ici-bas comme étant tous en AOG.
Merci d’avance pour votre habituel collaboration.

Bien à vous

Bonjour M. Walid,

Dans le but de ne pas perturber la progression du grand chantier actuellement en cours pour l'avion TS-LBF, nous vous prions de considérer que les commandes mentionnées dans l'email ci-dessous sont toutes en mode AOG (Aircraft on Ground).

Nous vous remercions par avance pour votre habituelle collaboration.

Cordialement,
